suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the interrupted-session resume case where a worker resumes after the assigned feature commit is already on `HEAD`, so the remaining required work is validation and handoff rather than restarting the red/green loop from scratch.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The rerun review for `mm-importer-planning-prerequisite-convergence-fix` found that the worker had to deviate from the current skill because `.factory/skills/migration-worker/SKILL.md:32-38` requires tests-first red/green on every run, while the worker handoff for session `683f3f74-0fa4-4f13-9c89-475b3d5b879e` documents a justified mid-validation resume of already-landed commit `6122ec0c6f8d0a9bf53b057fed6af37167c1339b`.
